SELECT value, log(value) FROM numbers WHERE value > 0;
SELECT value, log(value) AS log_value FROM numbers WHERE value <= 100;
CREATE TABLE additional_numbers (id INT, number FLOAT);
SELECT a.id, a.number, log(a.number) AS log_value FROM additional_numbers a JOIN numbers n ON a.number = n.value;
SELECT log(1 + log(value)) AS complex_log FROM numbers WHERE value > 0;
SELECT m.num, log(m.num) AS log_value FROM more_numbers m WHERE log(m.num) > 1;
SELECT (SELECT log(value) FROM numbers WHERE value = 100) AS log_100, (SELECT log(value) FROM numbers WHERE value = 1000) AS log_1000;
SELECT log(COALESCE((SELECT value FROM numbers WHERE value > 10 LIMIT 1), 1)) AS safe_log;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM numbers WHERE log(value) IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE test_log (input_value FLOAT, log_result FLOAT);
INSERT INTO test_log SELECT value, log(value) FROM numbers WHERE value > 0;
SELECT value, log(value) FROM (SELECT DISTINCT value FROM numbers) AS unique_values WHERE value > 0;
